title: USCIS fee calculator | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## USCIS fee calculator
BAL Community created this easy–to–use tool to help businesses and foreign national employees with calculating immigration filing fees.
Please note that the calculator provides an estimate only and that different fees than those listed below may apply in certain circumstances. USCIS will make the final determination on whether the $100,000 H-1B petitioner fee mandated under the September 2025 proclamation applies based on its discretionary evaluation of the petitioner’s circumstances.
For more guidance with calculating fees, contact BAL directly .
Expense if Online Filing
Expense for Nonprofits
Expense for Small Employers
I-90, Application to Replace Permanent Resident Card (Green Card)
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - H-1
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - H-2A (named).
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - H-2B (named)
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - L
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - O
Petition for Nonimmigrant Worker - Other
Petition for Alien Relative
Application for Travel Document - Reentry Permit or Advance Parole (general fee)
Immigrant Petition for Alien Worker
Notice of Appeal or Motion
Application to Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status (includes I-131 & I-765)
Application to Extend/Change Nonimmigrant Status
Petition to Remove Conditions on Residence
Application for Employment Authorization (related to OPT/STEM, H-4, Adjustment of Status and many other categories)
Application for Employment Authorization (initial application related to TPS, Asylum Applicants, Parole)
Application for Employment Authorization (renewal related to TPS, Asylum Applicants, Parole)
Consideration of Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals
Application for Action on an Approved Application or Petition
Request for Premium Processing -  I-129, H-2B, R
Request for Premium Processing - Other I-129s
Request for Premium Processing - I-140s
Request for Premium Processing - I-539s
Request for Premium Processing - I-765s
Application for Entrepreneur Parole
Application for Naturalization
Application for Certificate of Citizenship
- Totals include Asylum Program Fee and fees established under the July 2025 One Big Beautiful Bill Act where applicable.
- Different or reduced fees may apply depending on the circumstances. USCIS’s G-1055 Fee Schedule provides the most up to date information.
- Nonprofits include not-for-profit primary or secondary educational institutions or institutions of higher education as defined in section 101(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965; 501 (c)(3) tax exempt organizations; and government research organizations as defined in 8 CFR 214.2(h)(19)(iii)(C).
- Small employers include organizations with 25 or fewer full-time equivalent employees in the United States, including subsidiaries and affiliates.
- I-485, I-765, I-131 fees may be separated.
- I-765 and I-131 fees vary depending on the eligibility category, whether it is an initial application or a renewal, and other factors.
